description: Style NoteCrafted from the brand's best materials, this bag from quiksilver is a sure fire way of charming yourself into the fashion crowd. With bold prints and sharp silhouetting, this bag grabs attention (in the right way) and hits the style notes just right. Help yourself to this delicious indulgence, we assure you you won't regret it!Product DetailsWhite printed upper with one main zipped compartmentOne zipped compartment in the front with organizer pocketsHas a zipped pocket in the front and two pouches on either sideHas a haul loop and two adjustable, padded shoulder straps The print may vary slightly from product to product Material and Care100% polyesterWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSize Height: 40 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 14 cm
